name: Sho
cooked:
Dear Junhyuk Lee,

Provoked by your post, I summarized my thoughts on a separate post. While floor fee seems to be worth trying (as it is soft-forkable), an ultimate solution could be tail emission + EIP-1559 style fee burn and priority tipping in my opinion.

SHO
topic_title: [Research] Bitcoin After Block Rewards : preventing miner's deviation when the Bitcoin rewards is zero
topic_html_title: [Research] Bitcoin After Block Rewards : preventing miner’s deviation when the Bitcoin rewards is zero
raw:
Dear Junhyuk Lee,

Provoked by your post, I summarized my thoughts on a separate [post](https://delvingbitcoin.org/t/addressing-the-diminishing-block-subsidy/2640).
While floor fee seems to be worth trying (as it is soft-forkable), an ultimate solution could be tail emission + EIP-1559 style fee burn and priority tipping in my opinion.

SHO
